calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Maribel Maria Ponce, present in pro per was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: JANETH PONCE.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Reset To Sep-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: J. Leathley.
Petitioner: Maribel Maria Ponce, present in pro per, unable to provide the Court with the proof of publication.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
This matter is continued to Sept. 30, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. for proof of publication.
